name: Host Directory Parallel Assessors Pipeline
description: Host-directory workflow with two required assessors on the same subject revision.
outcome: Host-mounted work clears multiple assessors before successor packaging.

definition.process_instructions: The host maintenance lead frames the work. The host delivery specialist updates the host-mounted content. Two assessors review the same subject revision before the host release coordinator packages the result.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
